description_long: A rectangular light wooden serving board holds four pieces of sushi, three of which are salmon nigiri with bright orange fish slices draped over compact white rice, and one is a maki-style roll wrapped in dark seaweed. The sushi pieces are neatly aligned in a row, showcasing the glossy, marbled texture of the salmon and the subtle grain of the rice. To the side of the board, a pair of black chopsticks with white tips rests parallel to the board, and a small, round, dark soy sauce dish is placed nearby. The board's surface is smooth and clean, contrasting with the vibrant colors of the sushi. The overall presentation is minimalist and elegant, typical of Japanese cuisine. The set appears ready for immediate consumption, with all elements arranged for easy access.
description: A wooden board displays four pieces of sushi—three salmon nigiri and one maki roll—accompanied by black chopsticks and a soy sauce dish, arranged in a clean, minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sushi aligned on the board, with chopsticks and soy sauce dish clearly visible to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of each sushi piece, the full length of the chopsticks, and the round soy sauce dish.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backs of the sushi pieces, with the chopsticks on the right and the soy sauce dish partially obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sushi from the other end, with the soy sauce dish and chopsticks on the left.
